ddl.where: "queue_name" is not null and "queue_job_id" is not null
ddl.name: processing_jobs_queue_job_unique

ddl.where: "tx_hash" is not null and "address_id" is not null
ddl.name: idx_transaction_legs_unique

ddl.where: "tx_hash" is not null AND "address_id" is not null AND "kind" = 'fee' AND "derivation_rule" IN ('gas_fee', 'failed_tx_gas_fee')
ddl.name: idx_transaction_legs_gas_fee_unique

ddl.where: "tx_hash" is not null and "address_id" is not null and "from_address" is not null and "to_address" is not null
ddl.name: idx_transfers_unique

ddl.value: "claim_type" not in ('siwx_wallet', 'cli_claim_token') or ("source_id" is not null and "chain_type" is not null and "wallet_address" is not null and "year" is not null and "jurisdiction" is not null)
ddl.name: principal_claims_wallet_resource_fields

ddl.value: ("kind" = 'user' and "user_id" is not null) or ("kind" = 'anonymous_wallet' and "user_id" is null)
ddl.name: principals_kind_user_id_consistency

ddl.value: "attempt_count" >= 0
ddl.name: processing_jobs_attempt_count_non_negative

ddl.value: "max_attempts" > 0
ddl.name: processing_jobs_max_attempts_positive

ddl.value:
(
        "mapping_kind" = 'asset'
        and ("canonical_asset_id" is not null or "canonical_asset_symbol" is not null)
      ) or (
        "mapping_kind" = 'fiat'
        and "canonical_fiat_currency" is not null
      ) or "mapping_status" in ('pending_review', 'rejected')
ddl.name: provider_asset_mappings_kind_requires_target

ddl.value: "provider_asset_id" is not null or "natural_key" is not null
ddl.name: provider_assets_identity_requires_key

ddl.value: "mapping_status" in ('pending_review', 'rejected') or "transaction_type_key" is not null
ddl.name: provider_transaction_type_mappings_pending_review_allows_null_key

ddl.value: "external_id" is not null or "network_hash" is not null
ddl.name: provider_transfers_identifier_present

ddl.value: "from_address" is not null or "from_account_ref" is not null
ddl.name: provider_transfers_from_party_present

ddl.value: "to_address" is not null or "to_account_ref" is not null
ddl.name: provider_transfers_to_party_present

ddl.value: "amount" > 0
ddl.name: provider_transfers_amount_positive

ddl.value: "address_id" is not null or "cex_account_id" is not null
ddl.name: sourceable_id_not_null

ddl.value: "tx_hash" is not null or "external_id" is not null
ddl.name: transaction_legs_identifier_present

ddl.value: "tx_hash" is null or "address_id" is not null
ddl.name: transaction_legs_tx_hash_requires_address

ddl.value: "external_id" is not null or "source_raw_record_id" is not null
ddl.name: transactions_identifier_present

ddl.value: "confidence" >= 0 and "confidence" <= 1
ddl.name: transfer_reconciliations_confidence_range

ddl.value: "status" != 'auto_applied' or ("canonical_transfer_id" is not null and "deterministic" = true)
ddl.name: transfer_reconciliations_auto_applied_requires_match

ddl.value: "canonical_transfer_id" is not null or "canonical_transaction_id" is not null or "status" in ('pending', 'needs_review', 'rejected')
ddl.name: transfer_reconciliations_link_requires_target

ddl.value: "tx_hash" is not null or "external_id" is not null
ddl.name: transfers_identifier_present

ddl.value: "from_address" is not null or "from_account_ref" is not null
ddl.name: transfers_from_party_present

ddl.value: "to_address" is not null or "to_account_ref" is not null
ddl.name: transfers_to_party_present

ddl.value: "tx_hash" is null or ("blockchain_id" is not null and "address_id" is not null and "from_address" is not null and "to_address" is not null)
ddl.name: transfers_tx_hash_requires_onchain_context
